args: if [ -f /.dockerenv ]; then python -m mcp_server.cli stdio; elif command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker run -i --rm -v "${workspace}:/workspace" -e VOYAGE_API_KEY="${VOYAGE_API_KEY:-}" ${MCP_DOCKER_IMAGE:-ghcr.io/code-index-mcp/mcp-index:minimal}; else python -m mcp_server.cli stdio; fi
